opencode-pr-reviewer-code.description: A GitHub Action that runs an opencode-powered code review on a pull request and posts the verdict as a single comment that's edited as the run progresses.

opencode-code.description: OpenCode is an open source agent that helps you write code in your terminal, IDE, or desktop.

open-code-review.description: Open Code Review is an AI-powered code review CLI tool. It originated as Alibaba Group's internal official AI code review assistant — over the past two years, it has served tens of thousands of developers and identified millions of code defects.
